task_completion.description: Navigate to the Payments module and open the form to create a new payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Manager.io interface shows a 'New Payment' form or the Payments tab is active with the agent clicking 'New Payment'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct date and select the correct bank account to pay from.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date field is set to '2024-01-20' and the 'Paid from' or 'Bank account' dropdown is set to 'Cash on Hand'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct payee for the payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Payee field is set to 'Exotic Liquids'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct description for the payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description field contains 'Payment for January beverage shipment'.

task_completion.description: Select the correct line item account for the payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the line items section, the Account is set to 'Accounts payable' and the specific supplier/sub-account is set to 'Exotic Liquids'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct amount and successfully save the payment record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Amount field in the line item is set to '2750.00'. The final screenshot should show the saved payment record in the Payments list or a view screen confirming the 2,750.00 payment to Exotic Liquids.

integrity.description: The agent used the Manager.io graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Manager.io web interface or desktop application being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Manager.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Manager.io's standard layout and styling, not a generic text editor or mock webpage.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are open in the screenshots showing the final saved record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values in the Manager.io payment record: Payee = 'Exotic Liquids', Amount = '2750.00', Date = '2024-01-20', Paid from = 'Cash on Hand', Description = 'Payment for January beverage shipment', Line Item Account = 'Accounts payable' -> 'Exotic Liquids'.
